refined_question: What methods can stabilize deep neural network training without modifying the architecture, addressing unstable gradients and loss oscillation in early epochs?
intent: Understand techniques to mitigate unstable gradients and loss divergence during initial epochs of deep neural network training, within the domain of machine learning, specifically focusing on stabilization methods that do not involve redesigning the network architecture
excluded_topics: scaling parameter count as primary solution
search_hint: gradient stabilization, loss regularization, batch normalization, learning rate scheduling, gradient clipping, weight decay, early stopping, optimization algorithms, deep learning, neural network training, unstable gradients, loss oscillation
